headline: Most small business tools are monthly rentals. You can build them once instead.
body: The price looks small until you've paid it for two or three years — and you still don't own anything. I build tools you keep. If your current tools already work, I'll build around them instead of replacing them.

examples.name: Booking calendar
examples.desc: Skip the monthly scheduling fee. Build it once and keep it.

examples.name: Event ticketing
examples.desc: Per-ticket fees add up fast. For repeat events, owning the system costs less.

examples.name: Customer portal
examples.desc: Client login, order history, account info — built for how your business actually works.

examples.name: Forms & lead capture
examples.desc: No plugin maze. Just forms that match your workflow.
